memory: A negative continuity result is durable only as a scope-qualified observation. Not found must name the interface, source scope, query, traversal boundary, immutable source identity where available, and source classes not inspected. It cannot become project-wide absence until an explicit reconciliation artifact proves complete eligible-source coverage.

observed: operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json is a governance baseline dated 2026-07-11 and does not contain later continuity reconciliation work visible in commits.
Recent continuity records identify exhaustive eligible-path enumeration as unresolved.
Repository search returned no indexed matches for M-RECONCILE-002 during this run, while an immutable commit independently proves that M-RECONCILE-002 artifacts exist.
inferred: An empty indexed-search response describes that search interface and declared scope, not the entire repository history or project substrate.
Negative evidence cannot override positive immutable evidence from commits or fetched files.
proposed: Represent every negative finding with interface, query, inspected_scope, traversal_state, immutable_anchor, excluded_source_classes, result, confidence, and falsification_route.
Permit unlocated after exhaustive coverage only when a reconciliation artifact binds a complete eligible-source manifest and all traversal predicates pass.
Use not returned by interface within scope for partial searches.
superseded: Treating an empty repository search response as repository-wide absence.
Allowing negative search output to override a fetched file or commit diff.
unresolved: No source-complete effective-state reconciler has enumerated every eligible queue update and continuity record.
The originating immutable sources for M-004, M-005, and M-006 remain unresolved.
Connector search-index coverage and freshness are not independently proven.

exhaustive_gate: every manifest entry has an immutable identity
all pagination or graph traversal is closed
positive evidence conflicts are resolved without deletion

privacy_boundary: Only repository governance, commit metadata, abstract search behavior, and epistemic rules are retained. Private source contents and identifying material are excluded.
falsification_route: Produce a retained source-complete enumeration showing the queried interface covered every eligible source class and no positive source contains the target. Any immutable positive source falsifies project-wide absence but not the narrower interface-scoped observation.
